title: Getting your passport after you apply for a renewal from the US - Canada.ca
content:
Renew a passport from the US

## Getting your passport after you apply
We’ll mail the passport and any original documents you submitted to your address in the US by courier service. They may arrive in 2 different packages.
While you’re waiting for your passport, you can check the status of your application online (opens in a new tab) for instant updates.

## If you’re moving, but don’t have your passport yet
Contact us to update your mailing address if you
- haven’t received your passport and
- are moving within 30 days of submitting your application

## When you get your passport
Learn how to keep your passport safe after you get it .
